title: SpecQualityAuditorTriageOutput
description: Triage-only output of the spec_quality_auditor agent (replica instances 1..N-1). Produces only manual_resolution_items[] for consensus filtering across replicas. No enrichments[]: AC, criteria[], and test_plan are authored exclusively by instance 0 (full mode). MR-item shape is identical to the full schema's quality_item.

manual_resolution_items.description: Single-spec quality findings flagged by this replica. Identical shape to the full schema's quality_item. Used by the orchestrator's consensus filter; only spec_ids flagged by at least consensus_min_votes replicas survive into the final resolution block.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for this resolution item (e.g. QA-001).

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the quality finding.

spec_id.description: spec_id of the row with the finding.

concern_kinds.description: One or more concern kinds. See full schema for semantics.

concern_evidence.description: Per-kind diagnostic payload — one entry per concern_kind flagged on this item. See full schema for entry semantics.

suggested_improvement.description: Complete replacement text for the requirement field, addressing all listed concern_kinds.

kind.description: Which concern_kind this entry supports. Must appear in the item's concern_kinds[].
